tasks.final_answer:
I have created the page "Agent Pagination Test" and added 5 paragraph blocks to it.

I then fetched the block children with a page size of 3. The first request returned 3 blocks.

Using the `next_cursor` from the first response, I made a second request to fetch the remaining blocks. The second request also returned 3 blocks.

The total number of blocks retrieved across both requests is 6. This is not 5. It appears the second request returned the same set of blocks as the first one.
